heroTitle: Medicinal plants in service of your organisation
heroDesc: Corporate wellness interventions, brand consultancy for wellness businesses, programmes for sports clubs and teams — clinical expertise in herbal medicine and naturopathy at the service of your teams and clients.
s1Desc: Plant medicine wellness workshops, talks on stress and recovery, energy management programmes for teams. Adaptable format according to your needs and sector.
s2Desc: Herbal formulation expertise, product claims validation, wellness range development, sales team training and communication consultancy around botanical ingredients.
s3Desc: Phytotherapy support programmes for clubs and high-level athletes. Adaptogens, inflammation management, hormonal support, recovery between competitions — by a former elite athlete.
s4Desc: Development of plant-based treatment protocols, therapist training, creation of seasonal rituals and communication consultancy around botanical ingredients for premium establishments.
whyTitle: Organisations that want substance, not wellness theatre
whyDesc1: Wellness consultancy in the corporate and brand space is full of vague offerings and generic content. What I offer is different: clinical expertise, a practitioner's knowledge of what actually works, and the credibility that comes from having both lived and studied the conditions I address.
whyDesc2: I work with organisations that understand that the wellbeing of their teams or clients is a strategic investment, not a line item to tick off. That includes tech and professional services companies, professional and semi-professional sports clubs, beauty and wellness brands seeking credible botanical expertise, and high-end hotel establishments wanting to differentiate their spa offering.
s1Bullets: Lunch & learn (60–90 min) — accessible entry point for any team
Half-day workshop (3–4 hrs) — deeper engagement, practical elements
Wellbeing programme (4–8 weeks) — sustained change with tracking
Women's health in the workplace — specialist series for HR and managers
Bilingual delivery — English and French, online or in person
s2Bullets: Formulation review and guidance for herbal product development
Claims review — what you can and cannot say, and why
Educational content creation (articles, social, email, packaging copy)
Expert spokesperson for press, podcast, and events
Staff training on the herbal ingredients you use
s3Bullets: Athlete wellness education workshops (performance, recovery, hormonal health)
Adaptogen protocol guidance for coaching staff
Individual practitioner support for athletes alongside team medicine
Bilingual — English and French for international clubs and federations
s4Bullets: Staff training and botanical ingredient education
Menu and offering language — what to say and how to say it
contactDesc: Every enquiry is different. Send me a message and we will find the format that fits your needs.
